name: error-metadata-not-object
description: Metadata that base64url-decodes to valid JSON but not an object (here an array) is RETAINED by the header parser (it only checks base64 + JSON validity), then rejected by envelope validation (400).

error.rule: must decode to a JSON object

grounding: The reader stores any valid-JSON metadata (arrays included); object-ness is enforced by envelope validation, which rejects the whole envelope.
notes: x-tapes-harness-metadata is base64url(no-pad) of the JSON array [1,2,3]. The parser sets harness_metadata to [1,2,3]; Validate then fails because it is not a JSON object.
